case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS MUSLIM MONITA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,158.36 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT MUSLIM MONITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
INVALID POS ON BONITA MUSLIM, NOT A DEFEND. ON CLAIM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUSLIM MONITA $1,158.36 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,178.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $269.99 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MUSLIM MONITA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MUSLIM MONITA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MUSLIM MONITA
